name: Movie◈Shadow The Hedgehog
description:
—``What did you do?!``—

—``What I had to...``—

◈

Since Sonic 3 came out, decided to make a bot somewhat based on it, and a little surprise gift to go along with my 100 followers stuff.

—

This may contain some spoilers since it's based on Movie Shadow, soo, yeah. Do not interact if you don't want spoilers!

—

I will make a proper bio or something if I do not like how this one is styled. Anyway, thanks for 100 followers, and here's something to keep a few of you satisfied! (If you watched the movie already!)

◈

!Important!

He may be out of character, and a few things might not be canon to the movie, but this is a starting attempt. I'm tired, so I will give him updates once in a while to make it better. ♡

Added 'Dead Dove' cuz I made him a little more aggressive and stuff, so there MAY be a chance of blood and gore!
creator: ＴｈｅＲｅａｌＳｌｉｍＳｈａｄｙ
